Brand and Preferred Brand 
 110 = Generic and Preferred Brand 
 111 = Generic, Brand, and Preferred Brand 
 999 = Not Applicable 

COMMENT: There are a different number of records for each year to describe tiers, due to variation in the number 
of formulary tiers over time. This variable also appears in the Plan Characteristics - Base File (see 
PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_01 PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_09). 

The CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information submitted by Part D plan
